The '''''Prowler''-class reconnaissance vessel''' was a [[Spy/Legends|spy]] [[Starship/Legends|vessel]] for the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] built by the [[Republic Engineering Corporation]] as part of the [[New Class Modernization Program]].

==Characteristics==
The ''Prowler''-class shared designs with the [[Ferret-class reconnaissance vessel|''Ferret''-class]] but carried less stealth systems and equipment. [[Starship/Legends|Ships]] of this class were meant to gather information about enemy assets and positions for a prolonged period of time, keeping a distance, while still utilizing the ''Ferret''-class's baffled drive and chemical thrust.

The ''Prowler''-class was equipped with more missiles than the ''Ferret''-class in addition to a decoy package. It required six crewmembers to operate.

Vessels of this class were given alphanumeric designations like [[5P8]].
